reviews.comment:
Sábado medio día mucha espera para cargar combustible, ya que es la única estación de servicio en 150 kilómetros a medio camino entre Santiago y Córdoba.  Buena cafetería y sándwiches.  Baños limpios.  Podrían mejorar la atención en playa de servicios si habilitaran la otra isla de surtidores. Seguramente volveré en mi próximo viaje.

(Translated by Google)
Saturday midday, long waits to fill up, as it's the only gas station for 150 kilometers, halfway between Santiago and Córdoba. Good coffee and sandwiches. Clean restrooms. They could improve service at the pumps if they opened the other island. I'll definitely return on my next trip.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1NExxMUZnEAE

reviews.comment:
Los socios no hay lugar para estacionar mugre en los fondos. .como socio me desepciono

(Translated by Google)
There's no room for members to park their cars; the parking is filthy in the back. As a member, I'm disappointed.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1OTV1aUVBEAE

reviews.comment:
El personal atiende  bien era escaso.era 1 sólo para los surtidores  de nafta .estuve 45 minutos  de  espera. Y 2 colas que bajan  de la ruta.autos .motos y gente con bidones. Hasta las manos.

(Translated by Google)
The staff was helpful but scarce. There was only one person working the gas pumps. I waited 45 minutes. And there were two lines coming down from the highway—cars, motorcycles, and people with jerrycans. It was packed.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1cDR1dFVBEAE

reviews.comment:
Entrando a la provincia de Santiago del Estero, un buen lugar para tomar un café y contemplar el amanecer en las sierras, para luego continuar camino por la llanura santiagueña!...

(Translated by Google)
Entering the province of Santiago del Estero, a great place to have a coffee and watch the sunrise over the mountains, before continuing your journey across the Santiago plains!

reviews.comment:
Me atendieron como se atiende a alguien que no querés que vuelva, una pena, visite muchas Eess YPF y está no se alinea para nada con el resto... Mal trato, despectivo, en todos los sectores y también falta de higiene en la elaboración, realmente mala experiencia!!!

(Translated by Google)
They treated me the way you would treat someone you don't want to return. It's a shame. I've been to many YPF service stations, and this one doesn't quite match the rest... Poor treatment, dismissive, in all areas, and also a lack of hygiene in the preparation process. A truly bad experience!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1ODcyZU93EAE
